title: 全てのティアラを得たウマ娘へ

text_block_list.name: Classmate
text_block_list.text:
Good morning, Kawakami! Would it be okay if I
came to support you in your next race?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Oh my, of course! I'll let you know the date later!

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, wow... Kawakami has a race coming up? I have to
see this!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Rapid Dash! One yakisoba dog, please, ma'am!

text_block_list.name: School Store Lady
text_block_list.text:
Mornin', Kawakami! Good luck with your training
today!

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Did you see the way Kawakami took that corner?! Sigh... Her footwork is so cool.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Raaaaagh! Butterfly stroke!

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume C
text_block_list.text:
Wowie! ♪ She's so forceful and dynamic! Is that the
secret behind her speed?

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume D
text_block_list.text:
It just might be! We need to do our best, too! Come on,
we can't lose!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Glance...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Not exactly... I've just been feeling this distinct
sensation of being watched lately...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Given your achievements, it's only natural you
would attract attention.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Air Groove?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Think, Kawakami. What are the races that you've
won up until now?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Well... I won the Queen Elizabeth II Cup, and...
Oh, but then before that was...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Quite a lot!
choice_data_list: The Hanshin J.F. and the Tiara tour, too.
The Hanshin J.F. and the Tiara tour, too.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh—that's right! And there's the Victoria Mile,
too!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Exactly. You took on all the races most coveted
by Tiara tour challengers, and seized victory in
every one.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
It's only natural that more and more Umamusume
would begin looking to you as their benchmark.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
It's not only the younger students who are
watching you, either. Although it seems you've
yet to notice...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Hm? Notice what?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. Guess I have to point it out. You're so
focused on speeding ahead that you're oblivious
to the impact you've made.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
As I said, it isn't just the younger students you've
inspired.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...I too have resolved to take you down.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove... So you actually went and challenged
her in person?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
That's right... How could I resist the urge to face
her, after seeing what she's achieved?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: You're no different, I presume, Dober?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Naturally.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Kyaaaah! Did Air Groove actually just challenge
me?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: This feels like the twist from Princess Fighter☆Returns... No, wait. Was it Princess Fighter☆Stars?
choice_data_list: Is that the most important thing?
Is that the most important thing?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?
choice_data_list: You just have to keep giving it your all.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Oh my!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: That's so straightforward and simple!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Yes... I'll continue to shine brilliantly as a princess!
